name: AUDDIA INC.
business: Auddia Inc. develops the faidr app, an audio platform that uses proprietary AI to provide commercial-free AM/FM radio and podcast listening, and the Discovr Radio platform, which allows artists and labels to promote songs by inserting them into ad breaks on radio streams. The company targets consumers seeking personalized audio experiences and artists/labels seeking new music promotion channels. It generates revenue primarily through B2B subscriptions from artists and labels for guaranteed radio plays on the faidr app.

exposures.sentence: Auddia (the Company ) is an AI technology company headquartered in Boulder, CO that is reinventing how consumers engage with audio through the development of its faidr app an industry-first audio platform, which utilizes proprietary AI technology to personalize and customize both radio and podcast listening experiences and the Discovr Radio platform, a web-based portal that allows artists and record labels to promote songs on radio streams, through an integration with faidr.
We have developed our AI platform on top of Google s TensorFlow open-source library that is being taught to know the difference between all types of audio content on the radio.

catalysts.event: Launch of MVP version of Discovr Radio platform
catalysts.sentence: The MVP version of the Discovr Radio platform was released on January 20, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected closing of proposed business combination with Thramann Holdings
catalysts.sentence: The proposed transaction is expected to close in the second quarter of 2026, subject to customary closing conditions, including approvals by the Auddia stockholders, the effectiveness of the S-4 registration statement to be filed with the SEC to register the shares of McCarthy Finney stock to be issued in connection with the merger, and the continued listing of the combined company s common stock on Nasdaq.
